entity.summary: Massa-native decentralized exchange and fully on-chain DeFi protocol providing token swaps, concentrated-liquidity AMM trading, variable fees, advanced trading orders, and autonomous liquidity mechanisms.
entity.notes: Current first-party Dusa website identifies the protocol as a decentralized trading protocol on Massa and documents swaps, concentrated liquidity, variable fees, advanced orders, autonomous smart-contract features, and a live application. HEI consolidates Dusa and Dusa Protocol source rows into one entity.

evidence.title: Dusa Protocol official website
evidence.notes: First-party website identifies Dusa as the first decentralized trading protocol on Massa and documents swaps, concentrated liquidity, variable fees, advanced trading orders, autonomous liquidity, and fully on-chain infrastructure.

evidence.title: Dusa official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application endpoint remains reachable and is linked from the official Dusa website as the live exchange application.

evidence.title: Dusa DEX discovery entries
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Dusa Protocol on Massa; HEI consolidates Dusa and Dusa Protocol source representations into one entity.
